name: Ryan Goldsmith

description: A new hero who appears in Tiger & Bunny: The Rising serving as Barnaby's new partner in replacement of Wild Tiger. Like Barnaby, he showed his face in public as seen in the trailer. Ryan was a popular hero overseas and was hired by Schneider to replace Tiger as Barnaby's partner. At the end of the movie, he announces that another overseas company has offered him an even higher salary and that he will leave his Apollon Media job. name: Shiori Honda
description: A high school English teacher. She was once an aspiring guitarist who was very passionate about starting a band; however, the one that originally sparked her interest, her brother, left her family in debt after taking a 20,000,000 Yen loan. His disappearance caused Shiori Honda to lose interest for the music industry and become a more recluse, timid, and plain individual. name: Shiori Miyagi
description: **Height:** 157 cm (5'2") The type of high school girl who doesn't talk about herself much and only interacts with her few friends. She isn't at the bottom of the school caste system, but she is at the bottom of the second rank. Is the only child in a father-child household. Her father prioritizes work and doesn't come home often. She doesn't call people over to her house often, usually only Sendai. Truth be told, she's lonely.

name: Strength
description: __Height:__ 158 cm Strength is Yuu's darken persona in the other world. She wears long black boots similar to Black Rock Shooter's, black spandex and a white flamed embroidered hooded scarf. She has a vertebra like tail with white hair. Her main weapons are her two large black "Ogre Fists" that she wears over her arms and are as big as she is. name: Su-Bin Lee
description: She is the granddaughter of the Awakened Union leader. She is on par with Ji-Seok in terms of power, making her quite strong. She is friends with Ji-Seok, Ji-U, and U-In. Her ability is cryokinesis.

name: Valt Aoi
description: Valt Aoi is the main protagonist of the Beyblade Burst anime and manga series And The Number One Blader In The World. He is an enthusiastic Beyblader known for his Valtryek Beyblade. He founded Beigoma Academy's Beigoma Academy BeyClub where he served as captain. He competed in the National Tournament with Valtryek V2 Boost Variable and was the runner-up, but gained enormous popularity due to his incredible performance.

name: Yorishige Suwa
description: __Skill:__ Future Sight Worshiped as the God of Suwa by having the spirit of Suwa Myojin within him. He's the person who offers safety to Tokiyuki after the fall of his clan in 1333. He is one of the 3 most outstanding arahitogami in Japan.

name: Yvonne Smollett
description: **Height:** 167cm Yvonne was reincarnated into an otome game as the rich villainess. According to the game's plot, she is loathed by everyone and has the role of bullying the heroine, in order to push her towards the various love interests' romantic routes.

name: Akira Amatsume
description: **Height:** 153 cm Daughter of a devout family, the ever cheerful Akira lives alone on the property of a small yet sacred Shinto shrine. Akira’s energetic liveliness is contagious to those around her, with an innocent personality that makes befriending the girl second nature. name: Aoi Tsubaki
description: A second-year college student who has the ability to see spirits. She is passionate about food and loves cooking and eating. She was adopted by her grandfather after her parents neglected her, and he was the one who taught her how to cook. She is kind, often helping the ayakashi. She is also stubborn with reckless tendencies.

name: Beans
description: Beans (Maamen in the Nippon Animation adaptation) is Netero's personal secretary and helps to organize a lot of things during Hunter Exam. Beans gives examinees their number badges prior to the Hunter Exam and gives a presentation on the uses of the Hunter License to the successful candidates of the Exam.

name: Deborah Seymour
description: Deborah is described as a cold, calculating, and cruel woman by most people. She is the daughter of Duke Gorgias Seymour, a genius mage, and Marian Seymour. She is the younger sister of twins Rojard Seymour and Belec Seymour and the older sister of Enric Seymour.
mediaTitles: The Perks of Being a Villainess

name: Dong-Soo Seon
description: Dongsoo Seon is the father of Jin Seon and the executive CEO of G Corporation.

name: Ha-Ri Seo
description: Na-Ri's eldest sister. She took care of Min-U since he was a kid.

name: Hyun Jang
description: He is a student in the beauty department of J High School.

name: Jessica Ushiromiya
description: Krauss and Natsuhi's eighteen-year-old daughter. She is an energetic young girl, serving as the student body president at her school, and even leading a rock band. If her father inherits the family fortune, she will become the heiress to the Ushiromiya family, although the family's patriarchal hierarchy denotes her future husband will become the next head. name: Ji-Seok Yu
description: He is the younger brother of Ji-Yeong Yu, the CEO of Shinhwa Association. He is one of the most powerful, if not the most powerful, awakened person in his age group in South Korea. There are only a few teenage awakeners in Korea that are able to rival him. Like his sister, his awakened power is aerokinesis. He is friends with U-In, Ji-U Seo and eventually Su-Bin Lee.

name: Kaoru Orihara
description: Kaoru is an androgynous beauty. She's one year older than Nanako, but she's in the same class as her because a mysterious disease prevented her from attending school for a year. Kaoru is a real leader, in fact, besides being the "class-leader", she's also the captain of the school basketball team. She has a noble and generous heart, and can't bear any form of injustice or abuse of power. The name everybody calls her, "Kaoru-no-kimi" (Prince Kaoru), comes from Kaoru Udaisho, a noble character fro

name: Keita Amano
description: **Height:** 159 cm He is the protagonist of the GAMERS! series. He is the older brother of Kōsei Amano, a student from class 2-F and a member of a non-school recognized gamer appreciation group together with [Chiaki Hoshinomori](https://anilist.co/character/121825/Chiaki-Hoshinomori) and [Tasuku Uehara](https://anilist.co/character/121828/Tasuku-Uehara). name: Lloyd Bannings
description: __Affiliation__: Crossbell Police Department Special Support Section __Nationality__: Crossbellan A young detective that is assigned to the Special Support Section. He used to live in the Republic of Calvard prior to his employment at Crossbell Police Department. He is remarked as a brilliant detective, earning his Detective license at a very young age. He acts as a de facto leader of the Special Support Section due to his natural knack for leadership and charisma to inspire and lead.
mediaTitles: The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Cold Steel - Northern War
